summary: Iteration 42: Testing Help page feature and expired articles visibility fix. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Help.jsx correctly implements data-testid='help-page' and data-testid='help-nav-{section}' for all 6 sections
Layout.jsx correctly adds HelpCircle icon with data-testid='help-btn' in header next to notification bell
App.js correctly adds /help route as protected route accessible to all authenticated users
stats.py correctly implements $or filter for expiring_articles and expired_articles (created_by OR edit_permission_user_ids OR edit_permission_group_ids)
InfoBox component correctly renders with 4 types: tip (emerald/green), info (blue), warning (amber), danger (red)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Help page feature fully implemented and tested. HelpCircle icon visible in header for all roles (admin, editor). Clicking navigates to /help. All 6 sections work: overview, tipps, backup, admin, comments, permissions. InfoBox components render with correct styling (tip=green, info=blue, warning=amber, danger=red). Tables render with icons. Backend stats.py correctly filters expiring/expired articles by author OR edit permissions.

help_page.help_btn_in_header: PASS - data-testid='help-btn' visible next to notification bell
help_page.left_sidebar_sections: PASS - All 6 sections visible with data-testid='help-nav-{section}'
help_page.section_navigation: PASS - Clicking each section shows corresponding content
help_page.overview_section: PASS - Tables with icons, tip InfoBox, keyboard shortcuts
help_page.tipps_section: PASS - Tips table, best practices content
help_page.admin_section: PASS - Danger InfoBox (red), info InfoBox (blue), warning InfoBox (amber)

backend_stats_api.expiring_articles_visibility: PASS - Filtered by author OR edit_permission_user_ids OR edit_permission_group_ids
backend_stats_api.expired_articles_visibility: PASS - Same visibility filter as expiring_articles
